_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning the correct names for parts of our body and where they are.

_source.w: We are learning the correct names for parts of our body and where they are.
y: Using correct body part names helps us communicate clearly.
Knowing where body parts are helps us understand how our body works.
This knowledge helps us describe how we feel to a doctor or trusted adult.
eg: Pointing to and naming elbows, wrists, ankles, and shoulders.
Labelling body parts on a diagram.
Playing games where we touch the body part that is called out.
Singing songs that name different body parts.
Using correct names when talking about how we feel.
Identifying body parts during a health lesson.
